final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenr AS kommunenummer, navn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE navn ILIKE 'Kristiansand' LIMIT 1;
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 1 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 1, "action": "query"}

1.sql: SELECT kommunenr AS kommunenummer, navn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE navn ILIKE 'Kristiansand' LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and geometry as GeoJSON

2.description: select buildings in the municipality with geometry and bygningid

3.description: select 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting the municipality geometry (prefilter using municipality geometry from step 1)

4.description: select 200-year flomareal polygons intersecting the municipality geometry (prefilter using municipality geometry from step 1)

5.description: find buildings that intersect stormflo polygons (intersects)

6.description: filter those buildings to also intersect flomareal polygons (intersects)

7.description: sort by bygningid asc and limit to 10
